A logo watermark with stylized text.

atomic_facts.fact: The salad consists primarily of chopped green broccoli florets mixed with a white creamy dressing.
Small white cubes, likely cheese, are scattered throughout the mixture.
Dark reddish-brown pieces, resembling dried cranberries or cooked bacon bits, are visible within the salad.
The bowl has a dark, possibly black, rim visible on the right side.
The text 'The Cooking FOODIE' is visible in the top left corner.
